name: wedding-website-api
description: Wedding website backend API with PostgreSQL database

scripts.db:sync: node -e "require('./models').sequelize.sync({ alter: true }).then(() => console.log('Database synced')).catch(e => console.error(e))"
scripts.db:reset: node -e "require('./models').sequelize.sync({ force: true }).then(() => console.log('Database reset - ALL DATA LOST')).catch(e => console.error(e))"

author: Your Name
